acceptance.assertion: The CI job can evaluate PR review-gate state without leaking private evidence contents or requiring mutable operator secrets.
The design clearly defines which evidence can be committed, uploaded, or referenced and how stale evidence is detected.
A rollout plan explains when the status can become required and how high-critical platform review remains enforced.
Tests or workflow validation cover missing evidence, stale head/diff, green evidence and red evidence paths.

goal: Design and implement a safe CI status-check path for the PR review gate so merge readiness is visible as a required check rather than only a local operator command.

metadata.reason: CI integration is useful but distinct from the local gate hardening in PR #111.
metadata.verification_note: PR #345 added a trusted default-branch review-evidence status workflow and sanitized CI projection, preserved the local review-gate policy boundary, passed exact head/diff-bound high-critical self-review and full validation, was merged and deployed from the exact merged main commit, and produced the expected sanitized PASS projection in a deployed-runtime smoke test. The status remains advisory until branch protection is deliberately changed.

validation.github_ci: validate Python 3.10/3.12 and CodeQL passed on the final reviewed head
validation.self_review: high_critical PASS with 5 head/diff-bound iterations and zero material findings

deployment.runtime_health: healthy; deployment complete; integrity valid; audit valid and writable; kill switch false

implementation.rollout_status: advisory; Review evidence gate has not been made a required branch-protection check by this task

validated_acceptance.ci-boundary: PASS: Default-branch issue_comment evaluation uses the ephemeral GITHUB_TOKEN with read/read/statuses-write permissions, write-capable actor authorization, bounded exact comment revalidation, and a sanitized projection that excludes private audit prose and secrets.
validated_acceptance.evidence-inputs: PASS: Documentation defines committed workflow/schema code, sanitized uploaded status projections, digest-only audit references, exact head/diff stale detection, and the write-operator trust boundary.
validated_acceptance.required-check-plan: PASS: Rollout is documented as advisory, observation, then optional branch-protection requirement; high-critical depth and independent platform review remain separate, and rollback removes the branch-protection requirement first.
validated_acceptance.tests: PASS: Tests cover missing evidence, unknown fields, stale head, stale diff, red evidence, green evidence, weaker review depth/tier, unauthorized and superseded comments, edited comments, recursion, and workflow permissions; final repository validation passed 2552 tests with 2 skipped.

title: Run review gate as CI status
